---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a bounded improvement for Skylattice.
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Goal

Describe the outcome you want and who it helps.

## Proposed Change

Explain the smallest useful change that would solve the problem.

## Constraints

List any governance, memory, GitHub, or repo-boundary constraints that matter.

## Verification

Describe how we would know the feature is done.

## Notes

Link any related task brief, ADR, issue, or prior discussion.
